q: The students who have cleared English have been exempted ______ the retest.
The young have no respect ______ old age.
The story of the novel is not at all relevant ______ its title.
She will continue the work ______ her sister's marriage.
The new trustee is going to preside ______ the annual school meeting.
I was not at all surprised ______ his behavior.
The cat jumped ______ the table and stole a biscuit.
The loud cheers of the crowd were accompanied ______ loud applause.
My parents have been married ______ forty-nine years.
